rationale: Updated the task-list test to assert the control deck no longer carries the panel--controls class instead of relying on JSDOM computed-style defaults.
Removed panel--controls from the task-list control-deck markup and deleted the CSS reset block that had only been undoing that shared card treatment.
Applied the review’s requested direction by moving the fix into markup and test semantics rather than maintaining CSS overrides.
Replaced the hardcoded 38% midpoint with calc(50% + var(--mm-executing-sweep-layer-offset)) in frontend/src/styles/mission-control.css and verified the frontend/unit suites pass.
This top-level review is only a summary of the inline feedback thread; the actionable CSS comment was addressed directly.
